'''J9-B4''' was a [[J9 worker drone/Legends|J9 worker drone]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. Specifically tasked with maintaining the [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponics]] bay, the unit—along with its two companions, [[J9-R1]] and [[J9-K6-24]]—was considered a "busybody." A self-styled "efficiency expert," the droid had seemingly endless suggestions to improve crew morale and efficiency and bickered constantly with the other two J9 units on board.
